signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to nearly $2,400 amid a broader crypto market cap rise to $2.6 trillion.[1]
